skips.title: Photographs Of The Old Closes And Street Of Glasgow 1868/1877 by Thomas Annan
skips.reason: Dover Publications modern reprint (1977), paperback edition. Not an original Victorian book.

skips.title: Bird of Paradise .. Vintage 1869 book print
skips.reason: Single print/page removed from book, mounted in black mat — not a complete volume.

skips.title: The Wild Boar .. Vintage 1896 book print
skips.reason: Single print/page torn from a book, mounted in card — not a complete volume.

skips.title: Lovely little vintage 1896 book print.. The Sparrows reflection
skips.reason: Single print/page mounted in card — not a complete book volume. Disqualified as wrong item type.

skips.title: Beautiful vintage 1893 book print.. The Parrot and the shoe
skips.reason: Single print/page mounted in modern black mat — not a complete book volume.

skips.title: The Leaf Insect .. Vintage 1894 book print
skips.reason: Single print/page torn from a book, mounted on card — not a complete volume.

skips.title: Water Beetles.. Little vintage 1896 book print
skips.reason: Single print/page mounted in card — not a complete book volume. Hard skip per wrong item rules.

skips.title: Osprey Campaign Series 6: Balaclava, 1854
skips.reason: Osprey Military modern paperback with dust jacket design; photo 2 shows 'WITHDRAWN' library stamp and barcode — multiple hard skip criteria.

skips.title: Paris Under Siege 1870–71 | Folio Society
skips.reason: Folio Society reprint — distinctive FS gilt logo on spine, slipcase present. Modern edition, not Victorian original.

skips.title: Antique The Lay Of The Last Minstrel 1845
skips.reason: University College School prize book — effectively ex-institutional. Also Walter Scott poetry, slow category. Worn leather, inscriptions throughout.

skips.title: Antique book  Punch magazine 1869
skips.reason: Spine top badly crumbling/deteriorating (photos 2&3); leather boards heavily worn with significant damage — condition too poor to resell profitably.

skips.title: Arithmetic Designed for the Use of Schools: To Which is Added A Chapter on Decimal Coinage 1867
skips.reason: School arithmetic primer by Colenso, Longmans 1867. Wrong item — school textbook/primer category. Spine also heavily damaged and crumbling.

skips.title: Original Lloyds Book of Birds vol 1 plate 1896
skips.reason: Single loose plate (Plate XXI Reed/Sedge Warbler) plus list of plates page — not a complete volume, torn from book.

skips.title: vintage "Collecting English Coins 1837-1971" mini book published by Corgi
skips.reason: Corgi mini-book published 1971, post-1910, has ISBN-era barcode, thin pamphlet format with dust jacket cover.

skips.title: Antique book 1851 The Pilgrim’s Progress John Bunyan Rare Small Book
skips.reason: Pilgrim's Progress is theological/religious allegory — hard skip category. Spine also heavily deteriorated.

skips.title: A colour of time a new world history 1850 - 1960
skips.reason: Modern book — dust jacket present, bright white paper, contemporary design. Dan Jones & Marina Amaral, clearly post-2010 publication.

skips.title: The Betrothed: A Tale of The Crusaders by Sir Walter Scott 1897 antique Hardback
skips.reason: Walter Scott fiction by A&C Black — common reprinted series, low collector demand, no gilt, plain embossed cover only. Poor resale category.

skips.title: Biographical and critical miscellanies Prescott antique hardback book 1890
skips.reason: Head of spine badly torn/rolled (photo 3). Plain brown cloth with no pictorial decoration limits resale appeal despite gilt spine lettering and Lippincott publisher.

skips.title: Proverbs Proverbial Expressions Popular Rhymes of Scotland Andrew Cheviot 1896 antique hardback book
skips.reason: Photo 5 shows board completely detached — spine split with cover hanging off. Hard skip on damage grounds.

skips.title: A guide A comforter vintage book with inscription 1889
skips.reason: Title 'A Guide, A Comforter' is devotional/religious content — theology hard skip category. Also tiny pamphlet-scale volume.

skips.title: Vintage Little Blue Book for Scholars, 1880 written inside
skips.reason: Thin promotional booklet/pamphlet ('Little Blue Book for Scholars'), not a proper book volume. Spine under 1cm, advertiser-sponsored giveaway.

skips.title: The vicar of Wakefield Victorian novel 1880s book
skips.reason: Heavy water staining on endpapers (photo 3) — large tide marks disqualify this despite attractive blue gilt boards and Willoughby period printing.

skips.title: The Boys Own Annual 1891 to 1892
skips.reason: Bound periodical volume of Boy's Own Paper issues (1891). Periodical compilations, not a standalone book; plain undecorated boards, no gilt, low resale appeal.

skips.title: Original Lloyds Book of Butterflies Plate 1896
skips.reason: Single detached pamphlet/booklet — no boards, spine missing entirely, deckled torn edges visible. Not a complete bound volume.

skips.title: Original Lloyds 1896 Book of Butterflies plate.
skips.reason: Single plate/pages torn from book — not a complete volume. Hard skip per wrong item rules.

skips.title: Antique 1891 Victorian Book - A Little Pilgrim in the Unseen (Macmillan)
skips.reason: Plain grey cloth, no decoration beyond minimal gilt title, spine worn/faded with no gilt. Heavy foxing/spotting on back board. Low resale appeal.

skips.title: Original Lloyds 1896 Book of Butterflies Plate
skips.reason: Single pages/plates torn from book — no complete volume present. Hard skip: loose pages not a complete book.

skips.title: 30 x Antique 1890s Mrs Beeton's Household & Cookery Pages for Crafting
skips.reason: Loose individual pages torn from a book — not a complete volume. Hard skip: single prints/pages removed from book.

skips.title: Original Lloyd Book of Butterflies 1896 plate
skips.reason: Single print/pages torn from book — no cover or binding present, just loose plates and pages from Lloyd's Natural History 1896 Lepidoptera.

skips.title: The LIFE History of the United States 1849-1865 Hard Civil War Book M.O.D Stamped
skips.reason: Modern LIFE magazine series book; ex-library with Ministry of Defence and Chicksands library stamps, accession labels, and classification stickers.

skips.title: Vintage Retro book The Book of Beasts by E Nesbit - 1987 edition of this book first published 1899
skips.reason: Modern reprint — bright white paper, clean production, colour-printed boards. Not an original Victorian edition despite E. Nesbit authorship.

skips.title: The Quiver 1897 Antique Victorian Illustrated Magazine Bound Volume
skips.reason: The Quiver is a Sunday reading/religious magazine — theology/devotional category. Spine also severely damaged at base. Skip.

skips.title: Antique Tragedy of Julius Caesar Copyright 1872/1903
skips.reason: Ex-library: Dewey number 822.3 on spine, 'WITHDRAWN' stamp and school district ownership stamp visible. Hard skip.

skips.title: Antique “The Little Sand Boy” Dated 1880
skips.reason: Photo 4 shows severe mould/water damage across endpapers — hard skip on damage grounds.

skips.title: C1880 The Wide, Wide World - Antique Hardback - Victorian Classic Fiction - Illustrated Edition
skips.reason: Spine badly damaged/crumbling at top. Title page confirms Routledge 1899 — good publisher/date, but physical damage too severe to resell well.

skips.title: Antique 1856 classical music
skips.reason: Music score/oratorio — Haydn's Creation arranged by John Bishop, Robert Cocks publisher. Sheet music category; wrong item type for resale in this niche.
